title: stelis regalis
intro: Stelis regalis, also known as the queen stelis, is a type of flowering orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis regalis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
